name: Kapa repo ingestion audit
description: Weekday check that required coti-io repos are ingested in Kapa via GitHub Code; Slack alert when repos are missing.

prompts:
Audit Kapa GitHub Code ingestion for required coti-io repos.

1. Read `kapa-required-repos.yaml` in this repo. Audit every repo under `required:`.

2. For each repo, use the coti-knowledge MCP with a targeted query to find chunks tagged `# Coti-io > <RepoName> > Blob > ...`. Blob means GitHub Code ingestion.

3. Build INGESTED, MISSING, and UNCERTAIN lists.

4. If MISSING and UNCERTAIN are both empty: respond with exactly `OK: all required repos are ingested in Kapa.` Do NOT post to Slack.

5. If any MISSING or UNCERTAIN: post ONE Slack message titled `Kapa ingestion gap — N repo(s) need attention` with missing repos (and priority from YAML), fix steps (Kapa Sources → GitHub Code, one source per repo), and https://docs.kapa.ai/data-sources/github-code

Do not add Kapa sources — no public API for that.
